cards.title: Machine Learning & NLP
cards.text: Supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, gradient boosting, feature engineering and selection. NLP with transformers and BERT, sentence embeddings, and classical ML with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn.

cards.title: Data Engineering
cards.text: Designing pipelines and scalable data workflows with SQL and NoSQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Supabase), vector search with FAISS, and cloud-backed processing.

cards.title: LLMs, RAG & Agents
cards.text: Building with LangChain, LangGraph, and LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI): RAG, prompt engineering, vector search, and agent-style workflows for production-style applications.

cards.title: Full-Stack & APIs
cards.text: End-to-end apps with React, Node.js, Express, and SQLite; REST APIs and integrations such as Microsoft Graph API. Java and Spring for backend microservices and high-throughput systems.

cards.title: Cloud & DevOps
cards.text: AWS Lambda, EC2, and cloud architecture patterns; Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud VMs; Git, GitHub Actions, and deployment on platforms like Render.

cards.title: Analytics & Visualization
cards.text: Exploratory analysis with Pandas and NumPy; dashboards and reporting with Power BI, Tableau, and matplotlib for clear, actionable insights.
